backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining BlogPost type and CRUD operations (create, update, delete, get, getAllPosts, getPublishedPosts) using a Map to store blog posts in memory.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files including pages, components, hooks, and configuration files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes, defining design tokens for background, foreground, borders, and component colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the AyurGlow Secrets application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes (home, about, categories, blog, admin, legal pages, and remedy detail pages) and React Query client with Layout wrapper.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with branding, quick links navigation (including privacy/terms pages), social media icons, copyright notice, and Caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout wrapper component providing consistent structure with Navigation header, main content area, and Footer across all pages.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile menus, active route highlighting, integrated SearchBar with dropdown results, and click-outside/keyboard navigation handling.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Search input component with icon, clear button, and keyboard event handlers (Enter, Escape, ArrowDown) forwarding ref for external focus control.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: A dropdown component that displays search results for remedy pages with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter, Escape) and click handling. Shows results with title, category badge, and handles empty states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state. Invalidates and refetches dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality using DFINITY's AuthClient. Manages authentication state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for blog post CRUD operations (get all posts, get published posts, get single post, create, update, delete). Each mutation automatically invalidates relevant query caches.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemedySearch.ts: Defines a static array of remedy pages with metadata (path, title, category, keywords) and provides a filter function to search remedies by title, category, or keywords.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom Ayurvedic-themed color palette (earth green, sage green, warm brown, cream, gold) for both light and dark modes. Includes custom font families for body (Inter) and headings (Playfair Display).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Displays the About Us page with mission, philosophy, and offerings sections using Ayurvedic-themed styling and icons. Features hero section with leaf icon and three content cards describing the platform's purpose and services.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.tsx: Admin dashboard for managing blog posts with list view, delete functionality, and navigation to create/edit posts. Includes loading states, empty state UI, and confirmation dialogs for post deletion.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPage.tsx: Public blog listing page displaying published posts in a grid layout with category badges, dates, and read times. Includes hero section, loading states, and empty state handling with navigation to individual post details.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPostDetailPage.ts: Individual blog post detail page showing full post content with metadata (author, date, read time, category). Handles loading states, post not found errors, and includes back navigation to blog listing.
frontend/src/pages/CreateBlogPostPage.ts: Form page for creating new blog posts with rich text editor (ReactQuill), category selection, and publish toggle. Includes slug generation, tag parsing, and form validation before submitting to backend.
frontend/src/pages/EditBlogPostPage.tsx: Admin page for editing existing blog posts with form fields for title, category, content (ReactQuill editor), excerpt, read time, author, tags, and publish status. Fetches post data by ID and updates via mutation on submit.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/DandruffSca: Detailed remedy page for dandruff and scalp care featuring four Ayurvedic treatments (Neem-Tea Tree, Lemon-Yogurt, Fenugreek-Curd, Aloe Vera-Coconut) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/GreyHairSol: Grey hair solutions page presenting four natural remedies (Curry Leaves-Coconut Oil, Amla-Henna, Black Tea-Coffee Rinse, Bhringraj-Brahmi) to prevent and reverse premature greying with detailed instructions.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairFallTre: Hair fall treatment page showcasing four Ayurvedic remedies (Onion Juice, Fenugreek Seeds, Amla-Shikakai, Curry Leaves-Coconut Oil) with complete ingredient lists, application methods, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairGrowthP: React page component displaying hair growth remedies with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency for treatments like castor oil blends, aloe vera masks, egg-yogurt treatments, and hibiscus-curry leaves packs.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/OilsMasksPa: React page component showcasing hair oil and mask treatments including Ayurvedic hot oil, brahmi-amla oil, banana-avocado masks, hibiscus-fenugreek masks, and neem-tulsi scalp treatments with detailed preparation and usage instructions.
frontend/src/pages/HairCarePage.tsx: Landing page for the Hair Care category displaying a hero section and grid of five subcategories (Hair Fall Treatment, Hair Growth, Dandruff/Scalp Care, Grey Hair Solutions, Oils/Masks) with icons and links to detailed pages.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diabe: React page component providing natural remedies for diabetes and blood pressure management, including fenugreek water, bitter gourd juice, cinnamon tea, and garlic-ginger remedies, with an important medical disclaimer alert.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diges: React page component featuring digestive health remedies like Triphala churna, ginger-lemon tonic, ajwain water, and buttermilk with cumin, each with preparation steps, benefits, and recommended usage timing.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Immun: React page component presenting immunity-boosting Ayurvedic remedies including golden turmeric milk, amla juice, tulsi tea, and Chyawanprash with detailed ingredient lists, preparation methods, and health benefits.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Stres: Displays stress and sleep remedy solutions including Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Brahmi Tea, Chamomile-Lavender Infusion, and Warm Almond Milk with Saffron, each with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage instructions.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Weigh: Presents weight management remedies such as Honey-Lemon Warm Water, Triphala Tea, CCF Tea, and Ginger-Green Tea Blend with detailed ingredients, preparation methods, benefits, and recommended usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/HealthRemediesPage.ts: Landing page for Health Remedies category featuring a hero section and grid of five subcategories (Immunity Boosting, Digestion/Gut Health, Weight Management, Diabetes/BP Support, Stress/Sleep Solutions) with icons and navigation links.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page with hero section showcasing AyurGlow Secrets brand, a 'What We Offer' section displaying four service cards (health remedies, skin care, hair care, wellness), and a benefits section highlighting the Ayurvedic approach.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Static privacy policy page with hero section and card-based content layout explaining data collection practices, information types collected (automatic and user-provided), and privacy commitments.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcnePimples: Shows acne and pimple treatment remedies including Neem-Turmeric Face Pack, Tea Tree Oil Spot Treatment, Sandalwood-Rose Water Paste, and Aloe Vera-Lemon Gel with application instructions and benefits.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AntiAgingPa: Features anti-aging skincare remedies like Aloe Vera-Vitamin E Serum, Avocado-Honey Mask, Saffron-Almond Cream, and Papaya-Honey Enzyme Mask with detailed application steps and anti-aging benefits.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/DIYFacePack: Provides DIY face pack recipes including Multani Mitti Pack, Sandalwood-Turmeric Glow Pack, Oatmeal-Honey Pack, Banana-Honey Pack, and Neem-Tulsi Pack, each tailored for specific skin types with ingredients and application methods.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/NaturalGlow: React page component displaying natural glow remedies with four Ayurvedic treatments (turmeric-honey mask, saffron-milk cream, aloe vera toner, gram flour ubtan), each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/Pigmentatio: React page component for pigmentation and dark spots remedies featuring four treatments (lemon-honey mask, potato-cucumber juice, almond-milk cream, orange peel pack) with detailed ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/SkinCarePage.tsx: Landing page for the Skin Care category displaying five subcategories (Natural Glow, Acne, Pigmentation, Anti-Aging, DIY Face Packs) as clickable cards with icons, descriptions, and navigation links.
frontend/src/pages/TermsOfServicePage.ts: Terms of Service page with a medical disclaimer alert and expandable card sections covering agreement to terms, use of website, and other legal provisions with back-to-home navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom Ayurvedic color palette (earth-green, sage-green, warm-brown, cream, gold), extended theme settings using OKLCH color space, custom fonts (Inter, Playfair Display), and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking AyurGlow Secrets website state at version 19, documenting architectural decisions, existing features (homepage, about page, health/skin/hair care sections, blog), and planned monetization strategy through AdSense and affiliate marketing.
